fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item journal you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a brief description of the item journal template you are creating.

fields.name: Test Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the test report that is printed when you click Actions, point to Posting, and then click Test Report.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting report that is printed when you click Post and Print.

fields.name: Force Posting Report
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether a report is printed automatically when you post.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of transaction that will be used with this item journal template.

fields.name: Source Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the source code that specifies where the entry was created.

fields.name: Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason code, a supplementary source code that enables you to trace the entry.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the item journal template will be a recurring journal.

fields.name: Test Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the test report that is printed when you print the item journal.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Posting Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is printed when you print the item journal.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series from which entry or record numbers are assigned to new entries or records.

fields.name: Posting No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series code used to assign document numbers to ledger entries that are posted from journals using this template.

fields.name: Whse. Register Report ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID assigned to the Whse. Register Report.

fields.name: Whse. Register Report Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the report that is printed when you print the item journal.

fields.name: Increment Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies if batch names using this template are automatically incremented. Example: The posting following BATCH001 is automatically named BATCH002.
